creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 241486
Screenshot of #updating-src-quick-start

Under <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/cutting-edge/#updating-src-quick-start> there's what appears to be a warning in two sections. 

The first section has two circled numbers, there's excess horizontal white space between each number and its text. 

The subsequent section has maybe a slightly different colour for the background, a different colour (grey instead of brown) along its left-hand edge. 

It appears to begin with a bullet point (this seems peculiar), and does not have the excess white space issue that's noted in comment #0.
